description_long: This is a modern, built-in closet system with a U-shaped layout, featuring a combination of open shelving, glass-fronted upper cabinets, and closed wooden compartments. The closet is constructed primarily from wood with a rich, dark finish, and is framed by smooth, gray structural walls. The left side includes open shelves and a set of drawers, while the back wall has both open and closed storage, including a wine rack or horizontal divider section. The upper section is fitted with glass doors and bar pull handles, providing a sleek, contemporary look. The floor is tiled in gray, complementing the overall color scheme. The closet is designed for efficient storage and organization, suitable for use in a garage, utility room, or upscale urban apartment.
description: A U-shaped, built-in wooden closet with glass-fronted cabinets, open shelving, and a mix of drawers and closed compartments, framed by gray walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full closet interior with open shelves, drawers, glass-fronted cabinets, and a tiled floor.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid gray wall and the wooden top surface, with minimal closet details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the plain gray wall, with only the wooden top edges of the closet visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gray wall and a partial glimpse of the glass-fronted cabinets and wooden top.
